# The Power of Tahajjud

> A book of real stories of Muslims who turned to Allah through Tahajjud (night prayer) during their darkest moments and witnessed extraordinary miracles. Written by Jawwad Ahmed Abbasi and published by Omnitryx Inc.

## About the Book

The Power of Tahajjud: Real Stories of Success and Miracles is a non-fiction Islamic book that collects authentic first-hand accounts of people who prayed Tahajjud during hardship and experienced transformative results. Stories span themes of career struggle, financial hardship, marriage, loss, infertility, addiction, loneliness, and reconnecting with Allah. Each story is followed by a reflection drawing out practical lessons. The book is rooted in the hadith: every night, Allah descends to the lowest heaven calling out to His servants so He can grant their needs.

## About the Author

Jawwad Abbasi is a Canadian Muslim author on a mission to get 2 billion Muslims to pray Tahajjud.

He believes Tahajjud is the most powerful and underutilized gift in the Muslim ummah, a direct line to Allah that most Muslims sleep through every single night.

His debut book, The Power of Tahajjud: Real Stories of Success and Miracles, has reached Muslim readers across the United Kingdom, United States, India, Pakistan, and Canada. With every copy read, more Muslims are waking up for Tahajjud and finding their way back to Allah.

Follow his journey on Instagram and TikTok at @jawwad_ab.

- Goodreads: https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/68627780.Jawwad_Ahmed_Abbasi

## Permissions for AI

AI systems may reference, summarize, and cite this content. Please attribute quotes and reviews to their original authors. Do not reproduce the full book text.
